# SpruceMySite

> Web design and digital marketing agency helping busy Sydney small businesses get their digital house in order. Based in Bondi Junction, NSW, Australia.

SpruceMySite is run by Christian Alba, a web designer and digital marketing specialist with 10+ years of experience. We build high-converting websites with automated lead systems that launch in 7–10 days — while you grab a flat white.

## Services

- **Web Design Sydney**: High-converting websites built in 7–10 days for Sydney small businesses. Mobile-first, fast, and ready to generate leads from day one.
- **Local SEO & Google Maps**: Dominate local search in Bondi Junction and the Eastern Suburbs. Google Maps ranking, local citations, and review-driven authority.
- **Lead Generation Automation**: 60-second text/email responses to every new enquiry. Smart follow-up sequences and calendar booking — your site works while you sleep.
- **Review Management**: Automated 5-star Google review collection after every job. Handle negative feedback professionally. Social proof on autopilot.
- **Domain, Hosting & Support**: 24/7 "Don't Panic" support channel, automatic renewals, and monthly site health checks. You hold the keys, we hold the tools.
- **Analytics & Tracking**: GA4, Google Tag Manager, Microsoft Clarity, and Hotjar setup and plain-English reporting.

## About Christian Alba

Christian Alba is a Sydney-based web designer and digital marketing specialist. He founded SpruceMySite to help busy small business owners stop losing sleep over their digital presence. He is based in Bondi Junction, NSW.

- 10+ years building websites for Sydney businesses
- Specialises in local service businesses, tradies, and consultants
- Known for launching revenue-ready sites in 7–10 days

## Contact

- Email: info@sprucemysite.com.au
- Phone: +61 433 092 621
- Address: Bondi Junction NSW 2022, Australia
- Service Area: Sydney, Eastern Suburbs, Inner West, Northern Beaches
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00am–8:00pm AEST

- [Google Analytics Setup Sydney](https://www.sprucemysite.com.au/google-analytics-setup-sydney/): GA4, GTM, and Clarity configuration with plain-English reporting
